subcodes.first_line: This is a glorious Book sent down in truth from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Knowing. Verily, it is the Spirit of the Cause whereby the hearts are quickened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب کریم نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز علیم انه لروح الامر یحیی به افئده
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @justice and wrath of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
